root_cause: AWS VPC CNI failed to allocate ENI or private IP capacity for pod networking
evidence: Pod commerce/orders-api-66c5f8fd8f-v8q2n remains Pending during sandbox creation
Latest ENI allocation failure event reason: FailedCreatePodSandBox

Latest ENI allocation failure message: Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "7e2fd9": plugin type="aws-cni" failed (add): add cmd: failed to assign pod ENI/IP: ipamd: failed to call ec2:AssignPrivateIpAddresses for eni-0d80c7e0f3a1b4f6a: InsufficientFreeAddressesInSubnet: subnet subnet-09f8bca has insufficient free addresses

No successful container start observed after the latest ENI allocation failure
Pod is assigned to node ip-10-18-42-91.ec2.internal
AWS VPC CNI ENI/IP allocation failures persisted for 13.0 minutes

causes.message: Kubelet attempted to create the Pod sandbox and attach AWS VPC CNI networking
AWS VPC CNI could not allocate or attach ENI/private-IP capacity for the Pod
Pod sandbox creation failed because cloud CNI networking could not allocate pod network capacity

pod:orders-api-66c5f8fd8f-v8q2n: Pod sandbox creation is blocked by AWS VPC CNI ENI/private-IP allocation failure

Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = failed to setup network for sandbox "7e2fd9": plugin type="aws-cni" failed (add): add cmd: failed to assign pod ENI/IP: ipamd: failed to call ec2:AssignPrivateIpAddresses for eni-0d80c7e0f3a1b4f6a: InsufficientFreeAddressesInSubnet: subnet subnet-09f8bca has insufficient free addresses
node:ip-10-18-42-91.ec2.internal: Assigned node could not obtain AWS VPC CNI ENI/private-IP capacity

likely_causes: Subnet free IP addresses are exhausted for the node group
The instance reached its ENI or secondary private IP limit
AWS VPC CNI ipamd cannot attach an ENI or assign private IPs through the EC2 API
EC2 API throttling or IAM permissions are preventing ENI/private-IP allocation
suggested_checks: Inspect aws-node/ipamd logs for AssignPrivateIpAddresses, AttachNetworkInterface, or CreateNetworkInterface errors
Check subnet free IP count, instance ENI/IP limits, WARM_IP_TARGET, and WARM_ENI_TARGET
Verify the aws-node IAM role can call required EC2 network-interface and private-IP APIs
